meta.siteTitle: AI Machine - The Future Of Automation
meta.siteDescription: Engineering company delivering advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings.

aboutSection.description: Engineering company delivering advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings.

solutions.pageSubtitle: We deliver advanced automation solutions for industry and buildings.

brands.name: Basalte
brands.description: Belgian manufacturer of luxury smart home control interfaces. Elegant touch panels, keypads, and audio systems.

brands.name: Ekinex
brands.description: Italian manufacturer of KNX-based building automation systems. Control panels and visualization systems.

brands.name: JUNG
brands.description: German electrical systems manufacturer with over 100 years of tradition. Premium switch collections and KNX Smart Home systems.

brands.name: Gira
brands.description: German building automation leader operating in 38 countries. Intelligent KNX control systems and building management.

items.title: Intelligent Lighting & Shading
items.shortDescription: Automated light and shading control with JUNG, Gira, and Basalte panels.
items.fullDescription: We design KNX and Loxone-based lighting and shading systems that adapt to the time of day, occupancy, and user preferences. Using premium Basalte touch panels, JUNG and Gira switches, and Loxone sensors, we create intuitive, energy-efficient lighting environments in every room.

items.title: Climate & Energy Management
items.shortDescription: Intelligent climate control and energy optimization with Loxone and KNX.
items.fullDescription: Our climate and energy management systems ensure optimal thermal comfort with minimal energy consumption. We integrate heat pumps, ventilation, underfloor heating, and air conditioning into one cohesive system controlled by Loxone or KNX. Real-time energy monitoring with Ekinex visualization lets you make informed decisions about energy costs.

items.title: Security & Access Control
items.shortDescription: Integrated alarm systems, video surveillance, and access control.
items.fullDescription: We provide comprehensive building security by combining alarm systems, IP cameras, video intercoms, and access control into one integrated platform. Through KNX and Loxone integration, the security system works with lighting, shading, and notifications — automatically responding to events and giving you full control from your smartphone.

items.title: Home Automation & Multiroom AV
items.shortDescription: Centralized whole-home control and multiroom audio with Basalte and Loxone.
items.fullDescription: We build complete home automation systems that integrate all installations into a single interface. Basalte touch panels, the Loxone app, and KNX systems provide intuitive control from anywhere. The Basalte multiroom audio system and Loxone Music Server deliver premium-quality music to every room, with individual source and volume selection.

buildings.description: We design and implement smart building solutions that transform ordinary spaces into intelligent environments. Our systems integrate lighting, climate, security, and entertainment into seamless automated experiences.

sections.title: Smart Home Automation
sections.description: Complete home automation solutions including lighting control, climate management, automated blinds, and integrated entertainment systems.

sections.title: Building Management Systems
sections.description: Centralized building management platforms that optimize energy usage, monitor systems health, and provide real-time control over all building systems.

supervision.description: Our supervision services ensure that your automation and building systems operate at peak performance. We provide expert oversight, monitoring, and maintenance to keep your systems running smoothly.

sections.title: System Monitoring
sections.description: 24/7 real-time monitoring of all automated systems with instant alerts and rapid response protocols.

sections.title: Preventive Maintenance
sections.description: Scheduled maintenance programs that prevent downtime and extend the lifespan of your automation systems.

sections.title: Technical Support
sections.description: Dedicated technical support team available around the clock to resolve any issues quickly and efficiently.

aboutPage.title: About AI Machine
aboutPage.subtitle: The Future of Automation
aboutPage.story: AI Machine is an engineering company specializing in advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings. We combine cutting-edge technology with industry expertise to deliver solutions that transform how businesses and buildings operate.
aboutPage.mission: Our mission is to make intelligent automation accessible and practical for every industry, creating smarter, more efficient, and more sustainable environments.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We constantly push the boundaries of what's possible with automation technology.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every solution we deliver meets the highest standards of reliability and performance.

values.title: Partnership
values.description: We work closely with our clients to understand their unique needs and deliver tailored solutions.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Let's build the future together
contactPage.description: Ready to transform your business with intelligent automation? Get in touch with our team.

items.question: What building automation systems do you offer?
items.answer: We specialize in KNX and Loxone systems. We work with premium brands such as Basalte, Ekinex, JUNG, and Gira, offering elegant touch panels, switches, and control systems.

items.question: Do you carry out projects across Poland?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver projects nationwide. Our headquarters are located in Głosków near Warsaw, but we serve clients from every region.

items.question: How long does a typical smart home project take?
items.answer: The timeline depends on the project scope. A typical smart home installation takes 2 to 8 weeks. We prepare a detailed schedule before starting any work.

items.question: Do you offer post-installation service and support?
items.answer: Yes, we provide full technical support, 24/7 system monitoring, and preventive maintenance. Our dedicated team is ready to resolve any issue quickly.

items.question: What automation protocols do you work with?
items.answer: We primarily work with KNX and Loxone — two leading building automation standards. Both systems are open and allow integration with a wide range of devices from various manufacturers.
